name: claude-code-factory
description: Two factories in one plugin: (1) Extension Factory — generates skills, hooks, plugins, MCP configs, settings, CI/CD pipelines from natural language with 40 recipes and 12 combo patterns. (2) Dev Team Factory — generates 72 application development agent archetypes across 10 domains (web, mobile, data/ML, systems, cloud, DevOps) with 86 recipes and 14 team patterns. Includes intent-driven routing, automatic tech stack detection, and two-stage validation.
